title: Jobinia grandis

The genus Jobinia is part of the subfamily Asclepiadoideae, which is a group of plants commonly known as the milkweeds. Jobinia grandis is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of the continent. The classification of Jobinia grandis is still being studied and refined by botanists and taxonomists.
